title: 001199 with n_ens40 for both RealMLP seeds
summary: Push RealMLP variance reduction beyond n_ens32 while keeping 001199 structure.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Set n_ens=40 for both RealMLP seeds and keep the CatBoost correction fixed. Preserve the same validation protocol and artifact names.
expected_effect: Test whether larger internal RealMLP ensembles keep improving the best current concept.
risk: High runtime and possible overfit or negligible gain from diminishing returns.
